summary: Quick Actions Menu | Hearing Captions Option
description:
GIVEN the user is in the Quick Actions Menu
AND TTS is enabled

steps.action: WHEN the user navigates to the "Caption" option
steps.result:
THEN the user will hear: “Closed Captions, On/Off, x out of y options. Press select to turn Off/On, Press <appropriate_directions> for more quick actions options, Press down for player controls, Press back to dismiss controls.”

For example:
"Closed Captions, On, Press select to turn off"
"Closed Captions, Off, Press select to turn on"
